label: hate
rationale: 'Islamic party... responsible for thousands of Hindus killing and rape' attributes violence collectively to Muslims/Islamic party.

label: offensive
rationale: 'low-IQ Didmus Barasa' is personal abuse of a politician without protected-group targeting.

label: offensive
rationale: 'he hates half the fucking country' is vulgar political criticism without protected-group attack.

label: hate
rationale: 'IDIOT from Kikuyu community... watu Wajinga kama hawa watu wa gachagua' ridicules Kikuyu collectively as idiots/fools.

label: hate
rationale: 'Madem wajaluo na mechi' stereotypes and mocks Luo women as a group.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kasongos following children of Mau Mau... punishment will be painful' threatens Kikuyu with revenge using coded language.

label: offensive
rationale: 'hukiss ass ya kasongo' is vulgar personal abuse using coded language without protected-group targeting.

label: offensive

label: neither

label: hate
rationale: 'RUTO MUST Rule... whether KIKUYUS like it or NOT - By FIRE/BULLET' threatens violence against Kikuyu opposition.

label: hate
rationale: 'Waluhya ndio jobless urban na rural' attributes joblessness collectively to the Luhya ethnic group.

rationale: 'Bomb these demons... eliminate these Muslims satanic monsters' calls for violence and dehumanizes Muslims as demons/monsters.
